description: A player disembarks the Kommandos from the STATIONARY Battlewagon (tactical disembark, 18.04). Two things are asserted end-to-end through the live UI: (1) DisembarkController now emits slot-aligned positions, so every ALIVE model (the unit has casualties interspersed) lands at its placed position instead of leaving the tail unplaced; (2) the new PostDisembarkMoveDialog appears explaining the unit can still move, and clicking 'Move This Unit' leaves the unit selected in an active Normal move (movement_active, not yet moved) — the player can then actually move it, which the old silent flow hid behind a Confirm-Move trap.

steps.comment: Positions fix: all 5 ALIVE models sit next to the Battlewagon. Before the fix only 2 did; the other 3 kept stale pre-disembark positions far away (~4"+ up-board).
Dialog dismissed after choosing Move This Unit.
The unit is offered its move and has NOT been locked as moved — the reported trap is gone.
Unit is in an active Normal move: the player can now drag its models and Confirm Move.
